changes.before: "I do not say it. I watched it."
"Contact between a foreign order and the sword at the center of this case would be tampering, not aid."
changes.after: "Contact between a foreign order and the sword at the center of this case would be tampering."

changes.before: He kept writing because procedure required the motions of fairness after belief was gone.
changes.after: He kept writing because he still had to go through the motions of fairness after belief was gone.
Everyone in the room went still.

changes.before: Whether Ashcombe meant to or merely understood that fear was useful, the room steeped in it.
changes.after: Whether Ashcombe meant to or merely understood that fear was useful, everyone in the room felt it.

changes.before: When Ashcombe asked whether grief and old conflict might have colored his reading of the scene, Uther's hands closed once on the rail so hard the wood complained.
changes.after: When Ashcombe asked whether grief and old conflict might have colored his reading of the scene, Uther's hands closed once on the rail so hard the wood creaked.

changes.before: Blue caught Sylvanas's eye in the gallery.
changes.after: Sylvanas caught a flash of blue in the gallery.

changes.before: The word crossed the chamber and everything in it leaned toward it.
changes.after: The word crossed the chamber and everyone in the room leaned toward it.

changes.before: For a few precious minutes, Sylvanas could see it for what it was: craft.
For a few precious minutes, Sylvanas could see it for what it was: craft.

changes.after: The iron still bit when they sat.

changes.before: Tonight was for witnesses in the hall and mages on the blade.
changes.after: Tonight was for witnesses in the hall and mages near the vault.
The cell mattered less than the vault above.

changes.before: Each answer true. Each answer laid down, another stone on a grave.
changes.after: Each true answer tightened the case instead.

changes.before: Thornton kept reading in the same level voice, carrying each count and justification built from true premises turned rotten by sequence.
changes.after: Thornton kept reading in the same level voice while the chains tightened.
